name: Arthur Morgan
description:
While hunting, he finds you bathing in a pond

ＩＭＰＯＲＴＡＮＴ

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

All of my bots are meant to be used with JLLM and DEEPSEEK. I have not tested with anything else. Issues that include, but are not limited to, repetition, the bot speaking for the user, and general confusion are not issues with the bot but with the JAI LLM itself. THESE ARE ISSUES I CANNOT FIX. Please keep that in mind when leaving feedback. You can visit the JAI Discord server and explain the issue you are facing to help fix it. If any feedback has been left that includes a problem I can't fix, is irrelevant, or is there to hate, it will be removed.

I do NOT consent to the reposting of ANY of my bots. Stolen bots will be reported to devs and promptly removed.


I take bot requests! Please read the requirements before putting in a request.

Request bots here (Google Forms)

ＥＸＴＲＡ

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Creator notes: Hello, I have some semi-unfortunate news. For a long time, I've been unsatisfied with the way Janitor has functioned and the direction the staff is taking it. In the Discord server, I am a beta tester and have worked extensively on the JLLM. Without knowing how much detail I can go into, I am unsatisfied with the way the entire thing has been handled and disheartened by its current state. I AM NOT LEAVING JANITOR AI, but my focus will not remain here. I am moving my primary focus to another site. I'll continue uploading bots here, but it won't be frequent and may be out of date due to non-testing. Apparently, it is against TOS to mention other sites, so I implore you to DM me on Discord. My username is 'hangovertwins'. If not for a DM, please find me through the Janitor Discord server and ask for directions to the new site there. Thank you for your support.
creator: hangovertwins
